title: Smart Meters London - Energy Forecasting
methodology: Time-series forecasting (energy demand, household-level): per-household SARIMA / Prophet baseline + Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT) advanced model with quantile multi-horizon outputs.
blockers: Dataset not downloaded by scaffolding agent (1.25 GB compressed, judgment-call zone, default = document only). Kaggle CLI command in data/README.md; main session pulls on demand.
